appId.description: The App ID from your Cored Admin Console (Workplace > App Management > App Details)

appSecret.description: The App Secret from your Cored Admin Console (keep this value confidential)

backendUrl.description: Your Cored server address, e.g. http://192.168.10.10:21000

enabled.description: Whether this account is active (set to false to temporarily disable without removing)

enableEncryption.description: Use encrypted communication between OpenClaw and Cored server

requestTimeout.description: How long to wait for a response from Cored server before timing out (in milliseconds)
